mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT '[공지]' AS RNUM , A1.NTT_ID , A1.BBS_ID , A1.PARNTSCTT_ID , A1.ANSWER_AT
, A1.NTT_SJ , A1.NTT_CN , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA1, '') AS NTT_DATA1 , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA2, '') AS NTT_DATA2 , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA3, '') AS NTT_DATA3 , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA4, '') AS NTT_DATA4 , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA5, '') AS NTT_DATA5 , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA6, '') AS NTT_DATA6 , A1.NTT_IMG_FILE_ID AS NTT_IMG_FILE_ID , A1.RDCNT , A1.NTCR_ID , A1.NTCR_NM , DATE_FORMAT(A1.NTCR_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS NTCR_DT , A1.NOTICE_AT , A1.SECRET_AT , COALESCE(A1.ATCH_FILE_ID, '') AS ATCH_FILE_ID , DATE_FORMAT(A1.NTCR_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS NTCR_START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(A1.NTCR_END_DT , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS NTCR_END_DT
, A1.STTUS_CODE , CASE WHEN COALESCE(A1.STTUS_CODE , '') = 'A' THEN '사용' ELSE '미사용' END AS STTUS_CODE_NM , COALESCE((SELECT REPLY_YN FROM ARMBORD WHERE A1.BBS_ID = BBS_ID), 'N') AS REPLY_YN , COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ARTBBSM WHERE PARNTSCTT_ID = A1.NTT_ID), 0) AS ANSWER_CNT , CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ARTBBSM WHERE PARNTSCTT_ID = A1.NTT_ID), 0) = '0' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS USE_IMAGE FROM ARTBBSM A1 WHERE A1.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND A1.STTUS_CODE = 'A' AND A1.NOTICE_AT = 'Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN A1.NTCR_START_DT AND A1.NTCR_END_DT
AND (A1.NTT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR A1.NTCR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR A1.NTT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
AND A1.NTT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A1.NTCR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A1.NTT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
UNION ALL
SELECT CAST((T.TOTAL_COUNT - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A1.PARNTSCTT_ID DESC, A1.NTT_ID) + 1) AS CHAR) AS RNUM , A1.NTT_ID , A1.BBS_ID , A1.PARNTSCTT_ID , A1.ANSWER_AT
, A1.NTT_SJ , A1.NTT_CN , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA1, '') AS NTT_DATA1 , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA2, '') AS NTT_DATA2 , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA3, '') AS NTT_DATA3 , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA4, '') AS NTT_DATA4 , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA5, '') AS NTT_DATA5 , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA6, '') AS NTT_DATA6 , A1.NTT_IMG_FILE_ID AS NTT_IMG_FILE_ID , A1.RDCNT , A1.NTCR_ID , A1.NTCR_NM , DATE_FORMAT(A1.NTCR_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS NTCR_DT , A1.NOTICE_AT , A1.SECRET_AT , COALESCE(A1.ATCH_FILE_ID, '') AS ATCH_FILE_ID , DATE_FORMAT(A1.NTCR_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS NTCR_START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(A1.NTCR_END_DT , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS NTCR_END_DT
, A1.STTUS_CODE , CASE WHEN COALESCE(A1.STTUS_CODE , '') = 'A' THEN '사용' ELSE '미사용' END AS STTUS_CODE_NM , COALESCE((SELECT REPLY_YN FROM ARMBORD WHERE A1.BBS_ID = BBS_ID), 'N') AS REPLY_YN , COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ARTBBSM WHERE PARNTSCTT_ID = A1.NTT_ID), 0) AS ANSWER_CNT , CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ARTBBSM WHERE PARNTSCTT_ID = A1.NTT_ID), 0) = '0' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS USE_IMAGE FROM ARTBBSM A1 CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUNT FROM ARTBBSM WHERE BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND STTUS_CODE = 'A' AND NOTICE_AT != 'Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN NTCR_START_DT AND NTCR_END_DT
AND (NTT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR NTCR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR NTT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
AND NTT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND NTCR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND NTT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
) T WHERE A1.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND A1.STTUS_CODE = 'A' AND A1.NOTICE_AT != 'Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN A1.NTCR_START_DT AND A1.NTCR_END_DT
AND (A1.NTT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR A1.NTCR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR A1.NTT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
AND A1.NTT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A1.NTCR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A1.NTT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
) A0 LIMIT #{lengthPage} OFFSET #{startIndex}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT '[공지]' AS RNUM , A1.NTT_ID FROM ARTBBSM A1 WHERE A1.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND A1.STTUS_CODE = 'A' AND A1.NOTICE_AT = 'Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN A1.NTCR_START_DT AND A1.NTCR_END_DT
AND (A1.NTT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR A1.NTCR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR A1.NTT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
AND A1.NTT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A1.NTCR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A1.NTT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
UNION ALL
SELECT '일반' AS RNUM , A1.NTT_ID FROM ARTBBSM A1 CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUNT FROM ARTBBSM WHERE BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND STTUS_CODE = 'A' AND NOTICE_AT != 'Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN NTCR_START_DT AND NTCR_END_DT
AND (NTT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR NTCR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR NTT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
AND NTT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND NTCR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND NTT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
) T WHERE A1.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND A1.STTUS_CODE = 'A' AND A1.NOTICE_AT != 'Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN A1.NTCR_START_DT AND A1.NTCR_END_DT
AND (A1.NTT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR A1.NTCR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR A1.NTT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
AND A1.NTT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A1.NTCR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A1.NTT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
) A

SELECT NTT_ID, BBS_ID, NTT_SJ, NTCR_DT, ANSWER_CNT, NOTICE_AT, NTCR_NM, SECRET_AT FROM ( SELECT A1.NTT_ID , A1.BBS_ID , A1.NTT_SJ , DATE_FORMAT(A1.NTCR_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS NTCR_DT , COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ARTBBSM WHERE PARNTSCTT_ID = A1.NTT_ID AND ANSWER_AT = 'Y'), 0) AS ANSWER_CNT , A1.NOTICE_AT , A1.NTCR_NM , COALESCE(A1.SECRET_AT, 'N') AS SECRET_AT , 0 AS SORT_ORD FROM ARTBBSM A1 WHERE A1.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND A1.STTUS_CODE = 'A' AND A1.ANSWER_AT = 'N' AND A1.NOTICE_AT = 'Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN A1.NTCR_START_DT AND A1.NTCR_END_DT
AND (A1.NTT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR A1.NTCR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR A1.NTT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
AND A1.NTT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A1.NTCR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A1.NTT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
UNION ALL
SELECT A1.NTT_ID , A1.BBS_ID , A1.NTT_SJ , DATE_FORMAT(A1.NTCR_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS NTCR_DT , COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ARTBBSM WHERE PARNTSCTT_ID = A1.NTT_ID AND ANSWER_AT = 'Y'), 0) AS ANSWER_CNT , A1.NOTICE_AT , A1.NTCR_NM , COALESCE(A1.SECRET_AT, 'N') AS SECRET_AT , 1 AS SORT_ORD FROM ARTBBSM A1 WHERE A1.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND A1.STTUS_CODE = 'A' AND A1.ANSWER_AT = 'N' AND A1.NOTICE_AT != 'Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN A1.NTCR_START_DT AND A1.NTCR_END_DT
AND (A1.NTT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR A1.NTCR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR A1.NTT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
AND A1.NTT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A1.NTCR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A1.NTT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
) A0 ORDER BY SORT_ORD, NTT_ID DESC LIMIT #{lengthPage} OFFSET #{startIndex}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ARTBBSM A1 WHERE A1.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND A1.STTUS_CODE = 'A' AND A1.ANSWER_AT = 'N' AND NOW() BETWEEN A1.NTCR_START_DT AND A1.NTCR_END_DT
AND (A1.NTT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR A1.NTCR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR A1.NTT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
AND A1.NTT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A1.NTCR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A1.NTT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')

SELECT A1.NTT_ID , A1.BBS_ID , COALESCE(( SELECT BBS_NM FROM ARMBORD WHERE BBS_ID = A1.BBS_ID) , '') AS BBS_NM , A1.PARNTSCTT_ID , A1.ANSWER_AT , A1.NTT_SJ , A1.NTT_CN , COALESCE(A1.NTT_IMG_FILE_ID, '') AS NTT_IMG_FILE_ID , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA1, '') AS NTT_DATA1 , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA2, '') AS NTT_DATA2 , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA3, '') AS NTT_DATA3 , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA4, '') AS NTT_DATA4 , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA5, '') AS NTT_DATA5 , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA6, '') AS NTT_DATA6 , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA7, '') AS NTT_DATA7 , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA8, '') AS NTT_DATA8 , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA9, '') AS NTT_DATA9 , COALESCE(A1.NTT_DATA10, '') AS NTT_DATA10 , A1.RDCNT , A1.NTCR_ID , A1.NTCR_NM , CASE WHEN B2.USER_SE = 'USR' THEN '관리자' ELSE FN_MASK_NAME(A1.NTCR_NM) END AS MASK_NTCR_NM , DATE_FORMAT(A1.NTCR_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS NTCR_DT , A1.NOTICE_AT , A1.SECRET_AT , COALESCE(A1.ATCH_FILE_ID, '') AS ATCH_FILE_ID , DATE_FORMAT(A1.NTCR_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS NTCR_START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(A1.NTCR_END_DT , '%Y-%m-%d') AS NTCR_END_DT , COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ARTBBSM WHERE PARNTSCTT_ID = A1.NTT_ID AND ANSWER_AT = 'Y') , 0) AS ANSWER_CNT FROM ARTBBSM A1 LEFT JOIN ARMUSER B2 ON A1.NTCR_ID = B2.ESNTL_ID WHERE A1.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND A1.NTT_ID = #{nttId}

SELECT A1.NTT_CN AS REPLY_NTT_CN , DATE_FORMAT(A1.NTCR_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS REPLY_NTCR_DT , A1.NTCR_NM AS REPLY_NTCR_NM FROM ARTBBSM A1 WHERE A1.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND A1.PARNTSCTT_ID = #{nttId} AND A1.ANSWER_AT = 'Y' ORDER BY A1.NTT_ID ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT A1.NTT_ID AS nttId, A1.NTT_SJ AS nttSj FROM ARTBBSM A1 WHERE A1.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND A1.STTUS_CODE = 'A' AND A1.NOTICE_AT = 'Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN A1.NTCR_START_DT AND A1.NTCR_END_DT AND A1.NTT_ID < #{nttId} ORDER BY A1.NTT_ID DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT nttId, nttSj FROM ( (SELECT A1.NTT_ID AS nttId, A1.NTT_SJ AS nttSj, 0 AS ord FROM ARTBBSM A1 WHERE A1.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND A1.STTUS_CODE = 'A' AND A1.NOTICE_AT = 'N' AND NOW() BETWEEN A1.NTCR_START_DT AND A1.NTCR_END_DT AND A1.NTT_ID > #{nttId} ORDER BY A1.NTT_ID ASC LIMIT 1) UNION ALL (SELECT A2.NTT_ID AS nttId, A2.NTT_SJ AS nttSj, 1 AS ord FROM ARTBBSM A2 WHERE A2.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND A2.STTUS_CODE = 'A' AND A2.NOTICE_AT = 'Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN A2.NTCR_START_DT AND A2.NTCR_END_DT ORDER BY A2.NTT_ID DESC LIMIT 1) ) U ORDER BY ord LIMIT 1

SELECT A1.NTT_ID AS nttId, A1.NTT_SJ AS nttSj FROM ARTBBSM A1 WHERE A1.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND A1.STTUS_CODE = 'A' AND NOW() BETWEEN A1.NTCR_START_DT AND A1.NTCR_END_DT AND ( (A1.NOTICE_AT = 'N' AND (COALESCE(#{noticeAt}, 'N') = 'Y')) OR (COALESCE(A1.NOTICE_AT, 'N') = COALESCE(#{noticeAt}, 'N') AND A1.NTT_ID < #{nttId}) ) ORDER BY A1.NOTICE_AT ASC, A1.NTT_ID DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT A1.NTT_ID , A1.BBS_ID , B1.BBS_NM , A1.NTT_SJ , COALESCE((SELECT CONCAT(Z1.FILE_PATH, Z1.SAVE_NM) FROM ARTFILE Z1 WHERE Z1.FILE_CD = A1.ATCH_FILE_ID ORDER BY Z1.SEQ LIMIT 1), '') AS FILE_NM , DATE_FORMAT(A1.NTCR_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS NTCR_DT FROM ARTBBSM A1 INNER JOIN ARMBORD B1 ON A1.BBS_ID = B1.BBS_ID WHERE NOW() >= A1.NTCR_START_DT AND NOW() <= A1.NTCR_END_DT AND A1.STTUS_CODE = 'A' AND A1.ANSWER_AT = 'N' AND A1.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} ORDER BY A1.NTCR_DT DESC LIMIT #{topLimit}
